Opcode.name: PCM_OP_PYMT_UPDATE_SEPA_REQUEST
Opcode.Doc: This opcode is introduced to update /sepa/dd /sepa/ct or /sepa/dd/reversal object on request. The opcode takes in information about status, payment info id or message id about the sepa object that needs to be changed. It returns the poid of the updated object.

Poid.name: PIN_FLD_POID
Poid.Doc: Poid of the sepa object that needs to be updated.

String.name: PIN_FLD_PYMT_INFO_ID
String.Doc: Contains the new payment info Id that the sepa object needs to contain.

String.name: PIN_FLD_MSG_ID
String.Doc: The message id which the sepa object needs to be updated with.

String.name: PIN_FLD_STATUS
String.Doc: New status of the sepa object.

Substruct.name: PIN_FLD_CONTEXT_INFO
Substruct.Doc: Substruct to pass information from external clients.

String.name: PIN_FLD_CORRELATION_ID
String.Doc: Correlation id passed by an external system to BRM.

String.name: PIN_FLD_EXTERNAL_USER
String.Doc: User of an external system connecting to BRM.

Poid.name: PIN_FLD_POID
Poid.Doc: Poid of the /sepa object updated. Could be /sepa/dd /sepa/ct or /sepa/dd/rev object.

Substruct.name: PIN_FLD_CONTEXT_INFO
Substruct.Doc: Substruct to pass information from external clients.

String.name: PIN_FLD_CORRELATION_ID
String.Doc: Correlation id passed by an external system to BRM.

String.name: PIN_FLD_EXTERNAL_USER
String.Doc: User of an external system connecting to BRM.
